server.title: QUASAR [Ctext-primary font-bold]ROLEPLAY[/C]
server.name: QUASAR [Ctext-secondary font-semibold]ROLEPLAY[/C] COMMUNITY
server.subtitle: Forge Your [Ctext-red-600 font-bold]Legacy[/C] in Los Santos
server.description: Welcome to Quasar Roleplay, a premier FiveM server powered by QBCore Framework. Immerse yourself in a vibrant world of jobs, gangs, housing, and a dynamic economy. Shape your story today!

proTips: Type [Ctext-primary font-bold]/help[/C] to discover all available commands and start your adventure!
Join our [Ctext-secondary font-semibold]Discord[/C] at discord.quasarroleplay.com for events and community updates!
Visit [Ctext-red-600 font-bold]City Hall[/C] to apply for jobs or purchase properties!
Use the in-game [Ctext-blue-400 font-bold]phone[/C] to manage jobs, contacts, and bank transactions!
Form [Ctext-foreground/50]gangs[/C] or start businesses in our player-driven economy!

rules.description: Core rules for all players to ensure a fair and enjoyable experience.

items.title: No [Ctext-red-600]Cheating[/C]
items.content: Using cheats, exploits, or third-party software to gain an unfair advantage is strictly prohibited.

items.title: Respect [Ctext-primary]Others[/C]
items.content: Treat all players with respect. Harassment, racism, or toxic behavior will result in immediate action.

items.title: Roleplay [Ctext-secondary]Standards[/C]
items.content: Maintain immersion by staying in character. Use [Ctext-blue-400]/ooc[/C] for out-of-character communication.

rules.description: Guidelines for engaging in combat and PvP to maintain roleplay integrity.

items.title: No [Ctext-red-600]RDM[/C] (Random Deathmatching)
items.content: All combat must have a valid roleplay reason. Random attacks without context are not allowed.

items.title: Avoid [Ctext-orange-600]Combat Logging[/C]
items.content: Do not disconnect during or immediately after combat to evade consequences.

rules.description: Rules for vehicle usage to enhance realism and roleplay.

items.title: Realistic [Ctext-green-600]Driving[/C]
items.content: Drive vehicles realistically. Reckless driving without roleplay justification is prohibited.

items.title: Vehicle [Ctext-blue-400]Theft[/C] Roleplay
items.content: Stealing vehicles requires proper roleplay interaction and cannot be done randomly.

changeLogs.title: [Ctext-primary font-bold]Update 1.2.0[/C] - Economy Overhaul
changeLogs.content: Revamped the [Ctext-green-600]economy system[/C] with dynamic pricing and new businesses for players to own.

changeLogs.title: [Ctext-primary font-bold]Update 1.1.0[/C] - Gang System
changeLogs.content: Introduced [Ctext-blue-400]gang territories[/C] and new criminal activities. Enhanced roleplay with gang interactions.

changeLogs.title: [Ctext-primary font-bold]Update 1.0.0[/C] - Initial Release
changeLogs.content: Launched [Ctext-secondary font-semibold]Quasar Roleplay[/C] with core QBCore features, including jobs, housing, and economy systems.

keybinds.title: Open [Ctext-blue-400]Inventory[/C]
keybinds.description: Opens the [Ctext-blue-400]inventory[/C] to manage your items and equipment.

keybinds.title: Access [Ctext-blue-400]Phone[/C]
keybinds.description: Opens the [Ctext-blue-400]phone[/C] for contacts, messages, and banking.

keybinds.title: Toggle [Ctext-blue-400]Radial Menu[/C]
keybinds.description: Toggles the [Ctext-blue-400]radial menu[/C] for quick access to actions.

keybinds.title: Interact with [Ctext-blue-400]Environment[/C]
keybinds.description: Interact with objects, vehicles, or NPCs in the game world.

keybinds.title: Open [Ctext-blue-400]Main Menu[/C]
keybinds.description: Opens the [Ctext-blue-400]main menu[/C] for game settings and options.
